nasb.text: For whoever keeps the whole law and yet stumbles in one point, he has become guilty of all.

esv.text: For whoever keeps the whole law but fails in one point has become guilty of all of it.

cnv.text: 因為凡是遵守全部律法的，只要在一條上失足，就違犯所有的了。

ccb.text: 人只要触犯律法中的一条，就等于违犯了全部，

csbs.text: 因为那遵守整个律法的人，只在一条上跌倒，就成了干犯所有律法的了。
